action.reasoning: Observation: Persistent segfaults with any GNN or custom message passing. The linear model on aggregated features (AP 0.025) is stable but weak. Pre-installed RDKit enables molecular fingerprint computation from graph features (no network). Analysis: Using Morgan fingerprints as fixed-size graph features for MLP can yield AP >0.2, avoiding all segfault sources. Decision: Implement graph-to-molecule conversion, compute Morgan fingerprints for all graphs, train FeatureMLP on fingerprints, and submit eval within remaining time.
